name: PDFMonkey
description: PDFMonkey — Template-based PDF generation API with dynamic data injection and webhook delivery.

seo.title: PDFMonkey — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: PDFMonkey: PDFMonkey — Template-based PDF generation API with dynamic data injection and webhook delivery.

when_to_use: Template-based PDF generation with dynamic data and webhooks
Generating receipts, invoices, and certificates via API
HTML/CSS template editor for business document creation
Webhook-delivered PDFs triggered by Zapier or Make workflows
Replacing Word mail-merge with API-driven PDF generation

cons: Rate limits bite on high-throughput workloads
Styling control less granular than raw HTML APIs
review.verdict: Pleasant template-based PDF SaaS — great DX for small teams, thin at the high end.
review.best_for: Small SaaS generating templated docs (invoices, reports) with Liquid data binding.
